# Product Updates — External

Examples of product update posts targeting customers and/or leads.

**Audience:** Existing Nexudus customers and prospective customers/leads
**Tone:** Clear and benefit-led, but still direct. May highlight value and outcomes more than steps.
**Purpose:** Communicate what's new, why it matters to their space, and how to get started.

Drop `.docx`, `.md`, `.pdf`, or `.txt` examples here.

**Note:** Once you've added examples, flag any consistent tone/structure differences from the internal
format — these will be captured in `reference/product-update-format.md`.
